allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "@playwright/mcp@latest" -NoNewWindow -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\pw-mcp-err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\); "Server started OK" } else { "Server exited with code: $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\pw-mcp-err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
